rows.llm_rationale: Market is dated 2026-04-30, meaning we're already ~5 months into 2026 with actual Fed decisions observable. At 7% crowd price, the market is pricing ~1 cut maximum through year-end. Current economic conditions (as of late April 2026) and actual Fed actions to date would determine this; absent severe recession signals or dramatic pivot, 3 cuts total in 2026 requires either significant near-term cuts or previous cuts already taken. The 7% price appears slightly too low given base rates for 3+ cuts in any given year under normal conditions, but without knowing actual April 2026 economic data/Fed stance, only modest upward adjustment to ~12% is warranted.
rows.question: Will 3 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
